summary: Started matching the mnvibration menu translation unit, adding a large implementation pass in src/melee/mn/mnvibration.c and replacing many mnvibration.h UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS declarations with typed prototypes and data externs. The PR body explicitly called the work WIP and the comments preliminary; the bot report recorded 5 new 100% matches and 12 additional improvements in main/melee/mn/mnvibration.

key_files.role: Main decompilation work: includes expanded dependencies, local helper structs/data, JObj translation inline wrappers, mnvibration menu handlers, rumble/name-list logic, text cleanup, object setup, and matching tactics such as PAD_STACK.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mnvibration.c include expansion and local inline JObj functions

raw_diff: added/expanded mnVibration_802474C4, fn_80247510, fn_80248084, mnVibration_802480B4, mnVibration_8024829C, mnVibration_80248444, mnVibration_80248644, fn_80248748, fn_80248A78, mnVibration_80248ED4 work

key_files.role: Header cleanup: added platform/baselib/mtx includes, MnVibrationFloatData, externs for mnvibration data symbols, and typed prototypes replacing UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS for many functions.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mnvibration.h replaces UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS with HSD_JObj*, void, s32, HSD_GObj*, u8, and s32 signatures
raw_diff: mnvibration.h adds MnVibrationFloatData and externs mnVibration_803EECE0, mnVibration_804DC020, mnVibration_803EED04, mnVibration_804D4FF4, mnVibration_804D4FFC

what_changed.text: Expanded mnvibration.c from sparse stubs into a substantial menu implementation pass, adding local structs for assets and runtime data, static/global data, object creation/setup, controller input handling, rumble toggles, name-list scrolling, text lifecycle cleanup, and JObj animation updates.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: MnVibrationData fields include controller state, connected flags, scroll_offset, jobjs, texts, title_text, cursor_gobj
raw_diff: fn_80247510 handles B exit, controller rumble toggles, name navigation, persistent name rumble flag toggling

what_changed.text: Added local inline JObj translation getters/setters that assert on null jobj and update translate fields, with setters calling ftCo_800C6AFC when JOBJ_MTX_INDEP_SRT is not set.
evidence_refs: raw_diff comment: Local inline JObj functions using ftCo_800C6AFC pattern

what_changed.text: Recovered typed prototypes and data declarations in mnvibration.h instead of keeping placeholder UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS for the touched functions.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mnvibration.h prototype replacements lines for mnVibration_802474C4 through mnVibration_80248ED4

what_changed.text: Bot report recorded 5 newly matched functions: mnVibration_802480B4, mnVibration_8024829C, fn_80248748, mnVibration_802474C4, and fn_80248084.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev[bot] issue comment, ✅ 5 new matches

what_changed.text: Bot report recorded 12 improvements in unmatched items, including fn_80247510 at 73.73%, fn_80248A78 at 97.97%, fn_802487A8 at 87.42%, mnVibration_80248ED4 at 81.58%, mnVibration_80248444 at 91.62%, mnVibration_80248644 at 88.25%, and section score improvements.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev[bot] issue comment, 📈 12 improvements in unmatched items

smart_moves.text: Header signatures were updated alongside recovered bodies, avoiding a local cast workaround for mnVibration_80248ED4 and replacing placeholder prototypes with typed declarations.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mnVibration_80249174 changes from function-pointer cast to mnVibration_80248ED4(saved_arg)

smart_moves.text: The implementation introduced a local runtime data struct to express repeated offsets for jobj/text/title/cursor state instead of leaving all accesses as raw offsets.
Several repeated fixed-count operations were represented as loops over controller slots, text slots, jobj slots, or visible name rows rather than fully copied blocks.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: for i < 4 controller loops in fn_80247510 and mnVibration_8024829C
raw_diff: do while i < 8 text/name list loop in mnVibration_80248644
raw_diff: do while i < 0x19 jobj lookup loop in fn_80248A78 excerpt

decomp_lessons.lesson: For a WIP matching PR, bot match percentages are useful for intake, but preliminary comments and partial scores should not be promoted as validated semantics. Here the author explicitly described the comments as preliminary and follow-up validation as pending.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: still WIP; preliminary documentation via comments; more strongly validated in follow up PRs
text_corpus: bot report with new matches and partial improvements

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a recovered function body proves a signature, update the owning header in the same slice; this PR converted many mnvibration prototypes from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to typed HSD_JObj/HSD_GObj/u8/s32 signatures.

Local structs can make menu state more reviewable by grouping repeated jobj, text, cursor, and scroll fields, but field comments from this PR should remain tentative because the PR body says documentation comments were preliminary.

naming_conventions.text: Address-style global/function names were retained where semantics were not fully proven, e.g. mnVibration_802474C4, fn_80247510, fn_80248084, mnVibration_804D6C28.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added functions and globals retain address-style names

naming_conventions.text: Semantic local type names were introduced for apparent scoped concepts: MnVibrationAssets, MnVibrationJointAssets, MnVibrationData, and MnVibrationFloatData.

Some locals use role names such as data, assets, text, cursor_jobj, panel_jobj, scroll_offset, name_count, name_idx, and rumble_setting, while uncertain temporaries remain temp_r4, var_r4, sp14, sp10, or fn_ address-style functions.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used local inline wrappers for JObj translate get/set operations, with explicit __assert line numbers and ftCo_800C6AFC invalidation behavior in setters.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: Current standards prefer canonical header inline/helper forms when identifiable; these local wrappers should be curator-reviewed against header-inlines before becoming a general tactic.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used PAD_STACK in multiple functions, including PAD_STACK(8) in mnVibration_80248444/fn_80248748/mnVibration_80249174 and PAD_STACK(32) in fn_80248A78 excerpt.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: Standards require narrow verifier evidence for PAD_STACK; the bot report supports some matches/improvements but does not isolate each PAD_STACK use.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used do-while and for loops for fixed small counts such as 4 controllers, 8 visible names/text handles, and 0x19 jobj lookups.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mnVibration_80248644 do while i < 8 and j < 8
raw_diff: fn_80248A78 excerpt do while i < 0x19

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Saved the mnVibration_80249174 argument in saved_arg and called the typed mnVibration_80248ED4(saved_arg), replacing a function-pointer cast used to bypass a header mismatch.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mnVibration_80249174 saved_arg and direct mnVibration_80248ED4(saved_arg)
raw_diff: removed comment about cast to bypass header mismatch

accepted_candidate_records.title: PR 2142 mnvibration match progress
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2142 added substantial mnvibration.c matching work and mnvibration.h prototype cleanup. Bot report recorded 5 new 100% matches in main/melee/mn/mnvibration: mnVibration_802480B4, mnVibration_8024829C, fn_80248748, mnVibration_802474C4, and fn_80248084.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Header cleanup should accompany recovered bodies
accepted_candidate_records.text: This PR is a concrete example of replacing UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS in the owning header after recovering function signatures, including HSD_JObj*, HSD_GObj*, u8, s32, and void signatures for mnvibration functions.

source_update_candidates.title: mnvibration path scope
source_update_candidates.text: src/melee/mn/mnvibration.c and src/melee/mn/mnvibration.h belong to the menu mnvibration unit main/melee/mn/mnvibration; this PR's changes cover controller rumble settings, name-list vibration flags, menu text objects, and JObj animation setup.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potentially useful path fact for future mnvibration matching searches; should be reviewed before source promotion.

source_update_candidates.title: Review local JObj inline wrappers against canonical header-inline practice
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2142 used TU-local JObj translation wrappers with raw __assert file/line symbols and ftCo_800C6AFC invalidation. Curator should consider whether this is only a PR-specific matching tactic or whether missing canonical HSD_JObj helpers/inlines should be documented elsewhere.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: local inline JObj functions using ftCo_800C6AFC pattern
source_update_candidates.reason: The PR evidence shows the tactic, but current standards caution against leaving expanded/local header helper forms when canonical helpers are identifiable.

source_update_candidates.title: PAD_STACK evidence should be tied to per-function match status
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2142 contains PAD_STACK uses in functions with both full matches and partial improvements. Future curation could record this as a reminder to cite per-function objdiff evidence when retaining PAD_STACK in mnvibration or similar menu code.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report full/partial match statuses
source_update_candidates.reason: The bot report supports overall progress, but the slice does not isolate the necessity of each PAD_STACK use.

rejection_notes: Do not promote the PR's field comments for MnVibrationData as validated semantics; the author explicitly called documentation preliminary.
Do not infer human reviewer acceptance rationale; no human reviews or review comments are present in the slice.
Do not treat local JObj wrappers or PAD_STACK as accepted general style from this PR alone.
Do not claim all touched mnvibration functions matched; bot report distinguishes 5 new full matches from 12 partial improvements.
